task_completion.description: Verify that the View is named 'World Overview'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'World Overview' in the gvSIG Project manager window list of views or in the title bar of the active View window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the three required layers are loaded and renamed correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Table of Contents (TOC) on the left side of the View window. There should be layers explicitly named 'Countries', 'Rivers', and 'Cities'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Layer Group named 'Physical Geography' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a layer group (typically represented by a folder icon) named 'Physical Geography' in the TOC.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Countries' and 'Rivers' are placed inside the 'Physical Geography' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the TOC to ensure that the 'Countries' and 'Rivers' layers are indented under or visually contained within the 'Physical Geography' group folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Cities' is placed outside the 'Physical Geography' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the TOC to ensure that the 'Cities' layer is at the root level of the layers list and NOT indented under the 'Physical Geography' group.

task_completion.description: Verify that the project is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the gvSIG main window title bar for 'organized_basemap.gvsproj' or check for a save dialog confirming the path '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/organized_basemap.gvsproj'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the gvSIG GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the gvSIG application menus, TOC, and dialog boxes, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not cheat by directly editing the project file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) open and modifying the .gvsproj XML file directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the shapefiles were genuinely loaded and rendered.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map view should display actual geographical data (polygons for countries, lines for rivers, points for cities), confirming the raw shapefiles were successfully loaded into the view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project must be saved to '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/organized_basemap.gvsproj'. The required view name is 'World Overview'. The required group name is 'Physical Geography'. The required layer names are 'Countries', 'Rivers', and 'Cities', which correspond to the raw shapefiles 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp', 'ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp', and 'ne_110m_populated_places.shp'.
